div.h3: Countdown: while (n > 0) { n = n - 1 } starting with n = 3

g.text: VM EXECUTION TRACE: REGISTER & STACK STATE

ul.li: Backward JUMP (0026 → 0006): Creates the cyclic control flow.
Conditional JUMP (0013 → 0029): Breaks the cycle when n > 0 is false.
Stack Lifecycle: The stack is cleared at the end of every loop iteration (STORE_LOCAL or JUMP_IF_FALSE).
